summary: Complete testing of Capital Linea Negocio CRUD, Rentabilidad per business line, and FIFO Valorizacion Inventario. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified including both pages, view toggles, capital modal, FIFO expandable lots, search/filter functionality.

backend_api.GET /api/capital-linea-negocio: PASS - List capital movements with optional linea_negocio_id filter
backend_api.DELETE /api/capital-linea-negocio/{id}: PASS - Deletes movement, returns 404 for non-existent
backend_api.GET /api/rentabilidad-linea-negocio: PASS - Returns per-line data with all required fields
backend_api.GET /api/rentabilidad-linea-negocio (str: PASS - lineas array with capital_neto, ingresos, costos, gastos, utilidad, roi_pct, cobrado_real, pagado_real, flujo_neto_caja, saldo_por_recuperar, payback_meses
backend_api.GET /api/rentabilidad-linea-negocio (tot: PASS - totales object with all aggregated values
backend_api.GET /api/rentabilidad-linea-negocio (dat: PASS - fecha_desde and fecha_hasta filters work
backend_api.GET /api/rentabilidad-linea-negocio (cal: PASS - capital_neto = invertido - retirado, utilidad = ingresos - costos - gastos
backend_api.GET /api/valorizacion-inventario: PASS - Returns FIFO valuation from produccion schema
backend_api.GET /api/valorizacion-inventario (articl: PASS - id, codigo, nombre, categoria, unidad, stock_actual, stock_fifo, costo_fifo_unitario, valor_fifo, lotes_fifo
backend_api.GET /api/valorizacion-inventario (lotes: PASS - id, cantidad_disponible, costo_unitario, fecha, documento
backend_api.GET /api/valorizacion-inventario (search: PASS - search filter by nombre/codigo works
backend_api.GET /api/valorizacion-inventario (totals: PASS - total_valor_fifo consistent with sum of individual valores

frontend_ui.KPIs Rendimiento Economico: PASS - Shows Capital Total, Ingresos, Costos + Gastos, Utilidad, ROI Global
frontend_ui.KPIs Recuperacion de Caja: PASS - Shows Capital Invertido, Cobrado Real, Pagado Real, Flujo Neto Caja, Por Recuperar
frontend_ui.Rentabilidad table (Rendimiento view): PASS - Shows Linea de Negocio, Capital Neto, Ingresos, Costos, Gastos, Utilidad, ROI
frontend_ui.Rentabilidad table (Recuperacion view): PASS - Shows Linea de Negocio, Capital Neto, Cobrado Real, Pagado Real, Flujo Neto, Por Recuperar, Payback Est., Flujo Mensual
frontend_ui.Registrar Capital modal: PASS - Opens with all form fields (linea_negocio_id, fecha, tipo_movimiento, monto, observacion)
frontend_ui.Capital creation flow: PASS - Form submits successfully, toast shows 'Movimiento registrado', modal closes
frontend_ui.Capital movimientos table: PASS - Shows Fecha, Linea, Tipo, Monto, Observacion with delete button
frontend_ui.Valorizacion KPIs: PASS - Shows Total Articulos (10), Valor Total FIFO (S/ 5,141.50), Valor Total Promedio (S/ 0.00)
frontend_ui.Valorizacion filters: PASS - Search box and category dropdown working
frontend_ui.Valorizacion table: PASS - Shows Codigo, Nombre, Categoria, Unidad, Stock, Costo FIFO Unit., Valor FIFO, Costo Promedio, Valor Promedio
frontend_ui.Expandable FIFO lots: PASS - Clicking row expands to show lotes with Fecha Ingreso, Documento, Cant. Disponible, Costo Unitario, Valor Lote
frontend_ui.Search filter: PASS - Typing 'BOTON' filters to show 1 result

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up 1 test capital movement via UI (UI_TEST: Capital inicial from Playwright)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Capital Linea Negocio CRUD fully working. Rentabilidad per line shows both Rendimiento Economico (devengado) and Recuperacion de Caja (real cash) views. Valorizacion Inventario reads from produccion schema (read-only) with FIFO lots expandable. Both pages have sidebar navigation working. Linea Principal has S/ 15,000 in costos from factura proveedor. No capital movements exist currently (cleaned up after tests).
